response.justification: Strong, broad senior engineering background with genuine open-source leadership (founded and runs GISCollective) and extensive Linux/architecture exposure, which fit the technical and culture aspects of the role well. However two required qualifications are weak or unmet: German is listed as only 'Basic' against a hard C1 requirement, and Python does not appear in the skill set despite being a desired technical skill. Leadership is mostly demonstrated through founding and mentoring rather than formal team/project management. Worth a conversation to verify language level and management depth, but the German gap is a likely disqualifier.
strengths: Deep, long-running open-source and Linux experience, including founding and operating GISCollective
Broad senior full-stack and architecture background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and courses, plus DevOps/CI/CD ownership
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' versus the required minimum C1 — likely a hard disqualifier
Python not listed among skills despite being a desired technical skill
No formal Head-of/management title or explicit IT-project-management and UML modeling experience
